Fixes #<!-- issue number -->

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `./scripts/validate.sh` or explained why it could not run.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation, examples, or tests.
- [ ] I checked that no credentials, private keys, Terraform state, or internal
      infrastructure identifiers are included.

## Risk and rollout

Describe any effect on public ingress, TLS, IAM, Secrets Manager, DNS, MSK
connectivity, Terraform inputs/outputs, rollback, or required AWS validation.
